title: mo-config
description: Configuration schema for mo-skills. Resolution order: $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/mo-config.json → ~/.claude/mo-config.json → plugin defaults.

primaryRepo.description: Absolute path to the main git repository.

planStore.description: Absolute path to the directory where plan files are written. MUST be gitignored. All worktrees share this one store.

harnessDir.description: Directory containing DECISIONS.md, protocols.md, plan-quality-gate.md, tdd-and-simplify.md, frontend.md. If absent, skills fall back to the plugin's templates/harness/ copies.

enabled.description: If false, frontend-only rules (design doc reads, mobile check, container/view split) are skipped.

designDocs.description: Paths (relative to primaryRepo) of design docs mo-work must read before any frontend unit.

mobileWidth.description: Viewport width used for mobile verification after frontend changes.

containerCheckCommand.description: Shell command that verifies container/view separation, e.g. "pnpm test -- src/components/architecture.test.ts".

archLint.description: Architecture boundary linter. Empty string disables the check.

extraLinters.description: Additional lint/format commands to run alongside the main gates, e.g. ["uvx ruff check --fix", "uvx ruff format"].

prefix.description: Issue ID prefix used to extract ticket numbers from branch names, e.g. "MAX" matches MAX-123.

apiKeyEnv.description: Environment variable holding the tracker API key.

reviewState.description: State to move an issue into after mo-clean confirms merge.

bugfix.description: Branch template for bug fixes. {issue} and {slug} are substituted.

default.description: Normal base branch for planning + review.

commitScopes.description: Valid commit scopes for the Conventional Commit format used by mo-work.

protectedWorktrees.description: Absolute paths that mo-clean must never delete (main long-lived worktrees).

envFile.description: Path to the env file sourced before external API calls (Linear, etc).

artifacts.description: Language for committed artifacts (plans, docs, commit messages).

conversation.description: Language for conversational replies to the user.
